title: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
organization: Sudan University of Science and Technology
description: Studied core Computer Science fundamentals including mathematics, algorithms, data structures, databases, and software engineering. Pursued independent research in ML Optimization, NLP, Model Surgery, and ML for Biology alongside coursework.

title: Independent ML Researcher
description: Conducting self-directed research across ML Optimization, NLP, Model Surgery, and ML for Biology. Built and published datasets, developed Transformer-based models for Arabic NLP, and applied deep learning to biological sequence modeling. Work has been accepted at international workshops and conferences.
